```{r}
  #mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 

print(unique(toplot$s))
print(unique(toplot$b))
print(unique(toplot$sd))
  
conditions_df <- tibble(condition=c("acetate005","acetate020","glycerol040","glucose020","glucoseaa020"),condition_explicit=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))

myframes_sampled %>%
  mutate(c_cell=gfp_nb/length_um) %>% 
  mutate(sigma2_c_cell=(1/length_um*sqrt(cov_gg)-gfp_nb/(length_um**2)*sqrt(cov_ll))**2) %>%
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_c_cell=mean(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  #mutate(sd_c_cell=sd(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_c_cell=sqrt(mean(c_cell**2+sigma2_c_cell)-mean_c_cell**2)) %>%
  mutate(cv_c_cell=sd_c_cell/mean_c_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_c_cell=mean(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_c_cell=mean(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_c_cell=sd(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_c_cell=sd(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_c_cell=mean(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_c_cell=sd(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition")) %>% 
  mutate(condition_explicit=factor(condition_explicit,levels=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(mean_mean_c_cell,mean_sd_c_cell**2,col=condition_explicit,shape=mean_cell_rank),size=2)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=mean_mean_c_cell,ymin=(mean_sd_c_cell-sd_sd_c_cell)**2,ymax=(mean_sd_c_cell+sd_sd_c_cell)**2,col=condition_explicit))+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_c_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(y=mean_sd_c_cell**2,xmin=mean_mean_c_cell-sd_mean_c_cell,xmax=mean_mean_c_cell+sd_mean_c_cell,col=condition_explicit))+
  
  geom_point(data=toplot,aes(mean_mean_c_cell,mean_sd_c_cell**2,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2,size=2)+
  geom_line(data=toplot,aes(mean_mean_c_cell,exp(mean_mean_c_cell*s+b)),alpha=0.2,col="red",linetype="dashed")+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(x=mean_mean_c_cell,ymin=(mean_sd_c_cell-sd_sd_c_cell)**2,ymax=(mean_sd_c_cell+sd_sd_c_cell)**2,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_lambda_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(y=mean_sd_c_cell**2,xmin=mean_mean_c_cell-sd_mean_c_cell,xmax=mean_mean_c_cell+sd_mean_c_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  theme_cowplot()+
  #ylim(0,0.5)+
  #xlim(0,3)+
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log10',breaks=c(1e5,1e6,1e7,1e8),limits=c(1e6,1e8))+
  annotation_logticks(side="l")+
  #scale_x_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  xlab("Mean concentration (#GFP/min/um)")+
  ylab("Concentration variance")+
  guides(col=guide_legend(title="Conditions"))+
  guides(shape=guide_legend(title="Cell rank"))

ggsave("./20221208_presentation/var_c_vs_mean_c_log.pdf",width=7,height=4)

```

```{r}
toplot <- myframes_sampled %>% 
  mutate(c_cell=gfp_nb/length_um) %>% 
  mutate(sigma2_c_cell=(1/length_um*sqrt(cov_gg)-gfp_nb/(length_um**2)*sqrt(cov_ll))**2) %>%
  group_by(condition,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_c_cell=mean(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_c_cell=sqrt(mean(c_cell**2+sigma2_c_cell)-mean_c_cell**2)) %>%
  mutate(cv_c_cell=sd_c_cell/mean_c_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_c_cell=mean(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_c_cell=mean(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_c_cell=sd(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_c_cell=sd(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_c_cell=mean(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_c_cell=sd(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition"))
  #mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  
conditions_df <- tibble(condition=c("acetate005","acetate020","glycerol040","glucose020","glucoseaa020"),condition_explicit=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))

myframes_sampled %>%
  mutate(c_cell=gfp_nb/length_um) %>% 
  mutate(sigma2_c_cell=(1/length_um*sqrt(cov_gg)-gfp_nb/(length_um**2)*sqrt(cov_ll))**2) %>%
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_c_cell=mean(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  #mutate(sd_c_cell=sd(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_c_cell=sqrt(mean(c_cell**2+sigma2_c_cell)-mean_c_cell**2)) %>%
  mutate(cv_c_cell=sd_c_cell/mean_c_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_c_cell=mean(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_c_cell=mean(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_c_cell=sd(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_c_cell=sd(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_c_cell=mean(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_c_cell=sd(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition")) %>% 
  mutate(condition_explicit=factor(condition_explicit,levels=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(mean_mean_c_cell,mean_cv_c_cell,col=condition_explicit,shape=mean_cell_rank),size=2)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=mean_mean_c_cell,ymin=mean_cv_c_cell-sd_cv_c_cell,ymax=mean_cv_c_cell+sd_cv_c_cell,col=condition_explicit))+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_cv_c_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(y=mean_cv_c_cell,xmin=mean_mean_c_cell-sd_mean_c_cell,xmax=mean_mean_c_cell+sd_mean_c_cell,col=condition_explicit))+
  
  geom_point(data=toplot,aes(mean_mean_c_cell,mean_cv_c_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2,size=2)+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(x=mean_mean_c_cell,ymin=mean_cv_c_cell-sd_cv_c_cell,ymax=mean_cv_c_cell+sd_cv_c_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_lambda_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(y=mean_cv_c_cell,xmin=mean_mean_c_cell-sd_mean_c_cell,xmax=mean_mean_c_cell+sd_mean_c_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  theme_cowplot()+
  ylim(0,1)+
  #xlim(0,3)+
  #scale_y_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  #scale_x_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  xlab("Mean concentration (#GFP/um)")+
  ylab("Concentration CV")+
  guides(col=guide_legend(title="Conditions"))+
  guides(shape=guide_legend(title="Cell rank"))

ggsave("./20221208_presentation/cv_c_vs_mean_c.pdf",width=7,height=4)

```




```{r}
toplot <- myframes_sampled %>% 
  mutate(c_cell=c_m) %>% 
  group_by(condition,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_c_cell=mean(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_c_cell=sd(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_c_cell=sd_c_cell/mean_c_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_c_cell=mean(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_c_cell=mean(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_c_cell=sd(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_c_cell=sd(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_c_cell=mean(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_c_cell=sd(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition"))
  #mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  
conditions_df <- tibble(condition=c("acetate005","acetate020","glycerol040","glucose020","glucoseaa020"),condition_explicit=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))

myframes_sampled %>%
  mutate(c_cell=c_m) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_c_cell=mean(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_c_cell=sd(c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_c_cell=sd_c_cell/mean_c_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_c_cell=mean(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_c_cell=mean(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_c_cell=sd(sd_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_c_cell=sd(mean_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_c_cell=mean(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_c_cell=sd(cv_c_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition")) %>% 
  mutate(condition_explicit=factor(condition_explicit,levels=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  
  geom_point(aes(mean_mean_c_cell,mean_cv_c_cell,col=condition_explicit,shape=mean_cell_rank),size=2)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=mean_mean_c_cell,ymin=mean_cv_c_cell-sd_cv_c_cell,ymax=mean_cv_c_cell+sd_cv_c_cell,col=condition_explicit))+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_c_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(y=mean_cv_c_cell,xmin=mean_mean_c_cell-sd_mean_c_cell,xmax=mean_mean_c_cell+sd_mean_c_cell,col=condition_explicit))+
  
  geom_point(data=toplot,aes(mean_mean_c_cell,mean_cv_c_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2,size=2)+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(x=mean_mean_c_cell,ymin=(mean_cv_c_cell-sd_cv_c_cell),ymax=(mean_cv_c_cell+sd_cv_c_cell),col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_lambda_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(y=mean_cv_c_cell,xmin=mean_mean_c_cell-sd_mean_c_cell,xmax=mean_mean_c_cell+sd_mean_c_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  
  theme_cowplot()+
  ylim(0,0.5)+
  #xlim(0,3)+
  #scale_y_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  #scale_x_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  xlab("Mean concentration (#GFP/min/um)")+
  ylab("CV concentration")+
  guides(col=guide_legend(title="Conditions"))+
  guides(shape=guide_legend(title="Cell rank"))

ggsave("./20221208_presentation/cv_c_vs_mean_c.pdf",width=7,height=4)

```













```{r}
toplot <- myframes_sampled %>% 
  mutate(q_cell=q_m) %>% 
  group_by(condition,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_q_cell=mean(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_q_cell=sd(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_q_cell=sd_q_cell/mean_q_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_q_cell=mean(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_q_cell=sd(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_q_cell=mean(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_q_cell=sd(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition"))
  #mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  

conditions_df <- tibble(condition=c("acetate005","acetate020","glycerol040","glucose020","glucoseaa020"),condition_explicit=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))


myframes_sampled %>%
  mutate(q_cell=q_m) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_q_cell=mean(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_q_cell=sd(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_q_cell=sd_q_cell/mean_q_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_q_cell=mean(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_q_cell=sd(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_q_cell=mean(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_q_cell=sd(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition")) %>% 
  mutate(condition_explicit=factor(condition_explicit,levels=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(mean_mean_q_cell,mean_cv_q_cell,col=condition_explicit,shape=mean_cell_rank),size=2)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=mean_mean_q_cell,ymin=mean_cv_q_cell-sd_cv_q_cell,ymax=mean_cv_q_cell+sd_cv_q_cell,col=condition_explicit))+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_cv_q_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(y=mean_cv_q_cell,xmin=mean_mean_q_cell-sd_mean_q_cell,xmax=mean_mean_q_cell+sd_mean_q_cell,col=condition_explicit))+
  
  geom_point(data=toplot,aes(mean_mean_q_cell,mean_cv_q_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2,size=2)+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(x=mean_mean_q_cell,ymin=mean_cv_q_cell-sd_cv_q_cell,ymax=mean_cv_q_cell+sd_cv_q_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_cv_lambda_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(y=mean_cv_q_cell,xmin=mean_mean_q_cell-sd_mean_q_cell,xmax=mean_mean_q_cell+sd_mean_q_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  theme_cowplot()+
  ylim(0,0.6)+
  #xlim(0,3)+
  #scale_x_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(0.125,0.25,0.5,1,2))+
  xlab("Mean Production (#GFP/min/um)")+
  ylab("Production CV")+
  guides(col=guide_legend(title="Conditions"))+
  guides(shape=guide_legend(title="Cell rank"))

ggsave("./20221208_presentation/cv_q_vs_gr.pdf",width=7,height=4)

```




# Production OU parameters

```{r}
myparameters %>% 
  filter(name %in% c("mean_q","var_q","gamma_q")) %>% 
  select(name,final,carbon_source,carbon_source_concentration) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = name,values_from = final) %>% 
  mutate(condition=paste(carbon_source,carbon_source_concentration,sep="")) %>% 
  mutate(variance_q=var_q/(2*gamma_q)) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(mean_q,variance_q,col=condition))

myparameters %>% 
  filter(name %in% c("mean_q","var_q","gamma_q")) %>% 
  select(name,final,carbon_source,carbon_source_concentration) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = name,values_from = final) %>% 
  mutate(condition=paste(carbon_source,carbon_source_concentration,sep="")) %>% 
  mutate(variance_q=var_q/(2*gamma_q)) %>% 
  mutate(cv_q=sqrt(variance_q)/mean_q) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(mean_q,cv_q,col=condition))

```

# Production: full cell cycle variables

```{r}
myframes_sampled$mean_cell_rank <- factor(myframes_sampled$mean_cell_rank,levels = c(0:10))
conditions_df <- tibble(condition=c("acetate005","acetate020","glycerol040","glucose020","glucoseaa020"),condition_explicit=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))

toplot <- myframes_sampled %>% 
  mutate(q_cell=q_full_cellcycle*60) %>% 
  group_by(condition,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_q_cell=mean(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_q_cell=sd(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_q_cell=sd_q_cell/mean_q_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_q_cell=mean(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_q_cell=mean(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_q_cell=sd(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_q_cell=sd(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_q_cell=mean(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_q_cell=sd(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition"))
  #mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  


myframes_sampled %>%
  mutate(q_cell=q_full_cellcycle*60) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_q_cell=mean(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_q_cell=sd(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_q_cell=sd_q_cell/mean_q_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_q_cell=mean(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_q_cell=mean(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_q_cell=sd(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_q_cell=sd(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_q_cell=mean(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_q_cell=sd(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition")) %>% 
  mutate(condition_explicit=factor(condition_explicit,levels=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(mean_mean_q_cell,mean_sd_q_cell**2,col=condition_explicit,shape=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=mean_mean_q_cell,ymin=(mean_sd_q_cell-sd_sd_q_cell)**2,ymax=(mean_sd_q_cell+sd_sd_q_cell)**2,col=condition_explicit))+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_q_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(y=mean_sd_q_cell**2,xmin=mean_mean_q_cell-sd_mean_q_cell,xmax=mean_mean_q_cell+sd_mean_q_cell,col=condition_explicit))+
  
  geom_point(data=toplot,aes(mean_mean_q_cell,mean_sd_q_cell**2,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(x=mean_mean_q_cell,ymin=(mean_sd_q_cell-sd_sd_q_cell)**2,ymax=(mean_sd_q_cell+sd_sd_q_cell)**2,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_lambda_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot,aes(y=mean_sd_q_cell**2,xmin=mean_mean_q_cell-sd_mean_q_cell,xmax=mean_mean_q_cell+sd_mean_q_cell,col=condition_explicit),alpha=0.2)+
  theme_cowplot()+
  #ylim(0,0.5)+
  #xlim(0,3)+
  #scale_y_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  #scale_x_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  xlab("Mean production (#GFP/min/um)")+
  ylab("Production variance")+
  guides(col=guide_legend(title="Conditions"))+
  guides(shape=guide_legend(title="Cell rank"))
```

# Comparing full cell cycle observables and mean value over the cell cycle

```{r}
conditions_df <- tibble(condition=c("acetate005","acetate020","glycerol040","glucose020","glucoseaa020"),condition_explicit=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa"))


toplot_mean_norank <- myframes_sampled %>% 
  #mutate(q_cell=q) %>% 
  group_by(condition,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_q_cell=mean(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_q_cell=sd(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_q_cell=sd_q_cell/mean_q_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_q_cell=mean(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_q_cell=mean(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_q_cell=sd(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_q_cell=sd(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_q_cell=mean(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_q_cell=sd(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition"))
  #mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  

toplot_mean <- myframes_sampled %>% 
  #mutate(q_cell=q) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_q_cell=mean(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_q_cell=sd(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_q_cell=sd_q_cell/mean_q_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_q_cell=mean(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_q_cell=mean(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_q_cell=sd(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_q_cell=sd(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_q_cell=mean(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_q_cell=sd(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition")) %>% 
  mutate(condition_explicit=factor(condition_explicit,levels=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa")))
  
toplot_full_norank <- myframes_sampled %>% 
  mutate(q_cell=q_full_cellcycle*60) %>% 
  group_by(condition,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_q_cell=mean(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_q_cell=sd(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_q_cell=sd_q_cell/mean_q_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_q_cell=mean(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_q_cell=mean(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_q_cell=sd(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_q_cell=sd(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_q_cell=mean(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_q_cell=sd(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition"))
  #mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  

toplot_full <- myframes_sampled %>% 
  mutate(q_cell=q_full_cellcycle*60) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling) %>% 
  mutate(mean_lambda_cell=mean(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_lambda_cell=sd(lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_lambda_cell=sd_lambda_cell/mean_lambda_cell) %>%
  mutate(mean_q_cell=mean(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_q_cell=sd(q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(cv_q_cell=sd_q_cell/mean_q_cell) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,sampling,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(mean_mean_lambda_cell=mean(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_lambda_cell=sd(mean_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_lambda_cell=mean(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_lambda_cell=sd(cv_lambda_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_mean_q_cell=mean(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_sd_q_cell=mean(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_sd_q_cell=sd(sd_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_mean_q_cell=sd(mean_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(mean_cv_q_cell=mean(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sd_cv_q_cell=sd(cv_q_cell,na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(condition,mean_cell_rank,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(mean_cell_rank_integer=as.integer(mean_cell_rank)) %>% 
  left_join(conditions_df,by=c("condition")) %>% 
  mutate(condition_explicit=factor(condition_explicit,levels=c("acetate 0.05%","acetate 0.2%","glycerol 0.4%","glucose 0.2%","glucose 0.2% + aa")))
  
ptot <- ggplot()+
  geom_point(data=toplot_full,aes(mean_mean_q_cell,mean_sd_q_cell**2,shape=mean_cell_rank),col="blue")+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot_full,aes(x=mean_mean_q_cell,ymin=(mean_sd_q_cell-sd_sd_q_cell)**2,ymax=(mean_sd_q_cell+sd_sd_q_cell)**2),col="blue")+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_q_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot_full,aes(y=mean_sd_q_cell**2,xmin=mean_mean_q_cell-sd_mean_q_cell,xmax=mean_mean_q_cell+sd_mean_q_cell),col="blue")+
  
  geom_point(data=toplot_full_norank,aes(mean_mean_q_cell,mean_sd_q_cell**2),alpha=0.2,col="blue")+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot_full_norank,aes(x=mean_mean_q_cell,ymin=(mean_sd_q_cell-sd_sd_q_cell)**2,ymax=(mean_sd_q_cell+sd_sd_q_cell)**2),alpha=0.2,col="blue")+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_lambda_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot_full_norank,aes(y=mean_sd_q_cell**2,xmin=mean_mean_q_cell-sd_mean_q_cell,xmax=mean_mean_q_cell+sd_mean_q_cell),alpha=0.2,col="blue")+
  
  geom_point(data=toplot_mean,aes(mean_mean_q_cell,mean_sd_q_cell**2,shape=mean_cell_rank),col="red")+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot_mean,aes(x=mean_mean_q_cell,ymin=(mean_sd_q_cell-sd_sd_q_cell)**2,ymax=(mean_sd_q_cell+sd_sd_q_cell)**2),col="red")+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_q_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot_mean,aes(y=mean_sd_q_cell**2,xmin=mean_mean_q_cell-sd_mean_q_cell,xmax=mean_mean_q_cell+sd_mean_q_cell),col="red")+
  
  geom_point(data=toplot_mean_norank,aes(mean_mean_q_cell,mean_sd_q_cell**2),alpha=0.2,col="red")+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot_mean_norank,aes(x=mean_mean_q_cell,ymin=(mean_sd_q_cell-sd_sd_q_cell)**2,ymax=(mean_sd_q_cell+sd_sd_q_cell)**2),alpha=0.2,col="red")+
  #geom_point(aes(mean_cell_rank_integer,mean_sd_lambda_cell,col=mean_cell_rank))+
  geom_errorbar(data=toplot_mean_norank,aes(y=mean_sd_q_cell**2,xmin=mean_mean_q_cell-sd_mean_q_cell,xmax=mean_mean_q_cell+sd_mean_q_cell),alpha=0.2,col="red")+
  
  theme_cowplot()+
  #ylim(0,0.5)+
  #xlim(0,3)+
  #scale_y_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  #scale_x_continuous(trans='log',breaks=c(1,10,100,1000))+
  xlab("Mean production (#GFP/min/um)")+
  ylab("Production variance")+
  guides(col=guide_legend(title="Conditions"))+
  guides(shape=guide_legend(title="Cell rank"))

ptot
```

**Red**: mean value over the cell cycle, over 50 cells
**Blue**: full cell cycle observable
**Question to Bjoern**: could it be that the variance of the production is vastly underestimated in acetate 0.05%?

# Looking at the production variance, using all data points at my disposal

```{r}
myframes_final$mean_cell_rank <- factor(myframes_final$mean_cell_rank,levels = c(0:10))

myframes_final %>% 
  group_by(condition) %>% 
  mutate(variance_production=var(q,na.rm=FALSE)) %>% 
  mutate(mean_production=mean(q,na.rm=TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(mean_production,variance_production,col=condition))+
  theme_cowplot()


myframes_final %>% 
  group_by(condition) %>% 
  mutate(variance_production=var(q,na.rm=FALSE)) %>% 
  mutate(mean_production=mean(q,na.rm=TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(log(mean_production),log(variance_production),col=condition))+
  theme_cowplot()

myframes_final %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(variance_production=var(q,na.rm=FALSE)) %>% 
  mutate(mean_production=mean(q,na.rm=TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(mean_production,variance_production,col=condition,shape=mean_cell_rank))+
  theme_cowplot()


myframes_final %>% 
  group_by(condition,mean_cell_rank) %>% 
  mutate(variance_production=var(q,na.rm=FALSE)) %>% 
  mutate(mean_production=mean(q,na.rm=TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_point(aes(log(mean_production),log(variance_production),col=condition,shape=mean_cell_rank))+
  theme_cowplot()
```
